text:
There once lived a girl named Olivia. Olivia dreamed of traveling the world. Olivia dreamed of elephants. Olivia dreamed of singing opera.

Nobody believed in Olivia. Nobody knew Olivia.

One day, Olivia stumbled upon an old bookstore. Behind a cracked bookshelf she discovered a tome encrustationscript.

Encrustationscript!


That night, dreams flowed into Olivia’s dreams.

One dreamscape featured an animated elephant singing a ballad. Another was an opera cast full of talking owls!

Olivia couldn’t tell dreams from reality; she couldn’t decide her desires.

The next day…the bookstore shut.

That evening, Olivia received an owl courier.

A letter.

From OWLS.




It began:

Dreams are reality.

Choose wisely.



That night, Olivia saw dreams unfold—a singing elephant, owls singing opera.

She knew her choice.

She imagined herself traveling through landscapes painted by animals.

She wore feathers.

She wore opera.

Olivia lived happily ever after.

Dreams come true.

Just choose
